BROODMOTHER-BLIGHTFLY_POWER.description: At the start of every other turn, apply [gold]Weak[/gold] to a random enemy. On death, apply [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
BROODMOTHER-BLIGHTFLY_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of every other turn, apply [gold]Weak[/gold] to a random enemy. On death, apply [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
BROODMOTHER-BLIGHTFLY_POWER.title: Blightfly
BROODMOTHER-WASP_NEST_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, deal 3 damage to a random enemy. On death, deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.
BROODMOTHER-WASP_NEST_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of your turn, deal {PassiveDamage:diff()} damage to a random enemy. On death, deal {DeathDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
BROODMOTHER-WASP_NEST_POWER.title: Wasp Nest
BROODMOTHER-MOLT_THORNS_POWER.descriptio: At the end of the enemy's turn, lose [gold]Thorns[/gold].
BROODMOTHER-MOLT_THORNS_POWER.smartDescr: At the end of the enemy's turn, lose {Amount:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold].
BROODMOTHER-MOLT_THORNS_POWER.title: Molt
BROODMOTHER-TEMPORARY_THORNS_POWER.descr: At the end of the enemy's turn, lose [gold]Thorns[/gold].
BROODMOTHER-TEMPORARY_THORNS_POWER.smart: At the end of the enemy's turn, lose {Amount:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold].
BROODMOTHER-TEMPORARY_THORNS_POWER.title: Thorns
BROODMOTHER-RESISTANCE_POWER.description: [gold]Infestation[/gold] must exceed this amount to do damage.
BROODMOTHER-RESISTANCE_POWER.title: Resistance
BROODMOTHER-INFESTATION_POWER.descriptio: At the end of its turn, if [gold]Infestation[/gold] exceeds [gold]Resistance[/gold], lose HP. Increases [gold]Resistance[/gold].
BROODMOTHER-INFESTATION_POWER.smartDescr: At the end of its turn, if [gold]Infestation[/gold] exceeds [gold]Resistance[/gold], loses {CalculatedDamage} HP. Increases [gold]Resistance[/gold] by {ResistanceMultiplier}%.
BROODMOTHER-INFESTATION_POWER.title: Infestation
BROODMOTHER-ENCOURAGEMENT_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] for each insect alive.
BROODMOTHER-ENCOURAGEMENT_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} [gold]Vigor[/gold] for each insect alive.
BROODMOTHER-ENCOURAGEMENT_POWER.title: Encouragement
